prompt_en: Say: "Many legal experts argue that certain recent reforms are considered part of criminal law due to their severity."
expected_es: Muchos expertos legales argumentan que ciertas reformas recientes son consideradas parte del derecho penal debido a su severidad.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here for classification and in the passive voice to describe what something is considered.

prompt_en: Say: "It is essential that the minutes of the board meeting be reviewed and approved by all members."
expected_es: Es esencial que el acta de la reunión de la junta sea revisada y aprobada por todos los miembros.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used impersonally ('Es esencial que...') and in the passive voice with the subjunctive to express a requirement.

prompt_en: Say: "The main function of the peephole is to offer a basic level of security."
expected_es: La función principal de la mirilla es ofrecer un nivel básico de seguridad.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe the inherent purpose or function of an object.

prompt_en: Say: "The designated location for the environmental protest was the large roundabout near the city center."
expected_es: La ubicación designada para la protesta ambiental fue la gran rotonda cerca del centro de la ciudad.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used for the location of an event or happening, not the fixed location of an object.

prompt_en: Say: "They claimed that the primary cause of their marital breakdown had been an irreconcilable difference in values."
expected_es: Afirmaron que la causa principal de su ruptura matrimonial había sido una diferencia irreconciliable de valores.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate the cause or reason behind something.

prompt_en: Say: "For any modern cloud service, high scalability is not just an advantage, it is an absolute requirement."
expected_es: Para cualquier servicio moderno en la nube, la alta escalabilidad no es solo una ventaja, es un requisito absoluto.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER describes an inherent and permanent characteristic or quality of the subject.

prompt_en: Say: "We hope that the official application form will be processed quickly by the administration."
expected_es: Esperamos que la instancia oficial sea tramitada rápidamente por la administración.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used for the passive voice, indicating an action being performed on the subject, and in the subjunctive due to the expression of hope.

prompt_en: Say: "The base of this exquisite sauce is a very slow and aromatic sauté of vegetables."
expected_es: La base de esta exquisita salsa es un rehogado de verduras muy lento y aromático.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to classify or describe what something inherently is or is made of.

prompt_en: Say: "It is always advisable that direct confrontation be avoided in negotiations to reach a consensus."
expected_es: Siempre es aconsejable que la confrontación directa sea evitada en las negociaciones para llegar a un consenso.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used in an impersonal expression ('es aconsejable') requiring the subjunctive, and in the passive voice.

prompt_en: Say: "From an ethical perspective, the new policy is deeply flawed and should be revised."
expected_es: Desde una perspectiva ética, la nueva política es profundamente defectuosa y debería ser revisada.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to express an inherent quality or identity of the policy from a given viewpoint.
